name: 圣维丹物语
short_description: A team mode RPG strategy game, it has a ranch cultivation system, operates ranches to obtain role cultivation resources, and can freely choose role cultivation methods. It uses different roles to combine a strong team and strengthen the team's ability to take risks.
detailed_description: As an adventurer, you have received a guild mission to find the designated mysterious person in Saint Vedan Town, and a remote secret is being revealed due to your arrival. Danger comes to you, but as an adventurer, you are full of blood. Through the study of business skills and the accumulation of combat experience, you will gradually expand the ranch and enhance the reputation of adventurers, and your destiny will be changed.
about_the_game: As an adventurer, you have received a guild mission to find the designated mysterious person in Saint Vedan Town, and a remote secret is being revealed due to your arrival. Through the study of business skills and the accumulation of combat experience, you will gradually expand the ranch and enhance the reputation of adventurers, and your destiny will be changed.
